error_signature: unable to extract text from binary file
title: Unable to extract text from binary file
symptom: The output from the file node shows file metadata but not the actual content. The user sees a message indicating the file is in binary format.
applies_when: Using a node to read files from disk
File content is in binary format
not_this_if: File content is already in text format
Using a different node for text extraction
root_cause: When a file is read in binary format, n8n does not automatically convert it to text. This requires an additional step to extract the content using the appropriate node designed for text extraction.
fix_steps: Add an 'Extract from File' node to your workflow
Configure it to extract from the text file
Connect the output of the file node to the input of the Extract from File node
Pass the output to the next node in your workflow
agent_instruction: Use the 'Extract from File' node to convert the binary file content to text.
